question: Show all book titles and corresponding author names.
sql: SELECT Book.ISBN, Book.Title, Author.Name FROM Book JOIN Author_Book ON Book.ISBN = Author_Book.ISBN JOIN Author ON Author_Book.Author = Author.idAuthor;

back_translation.intent: 查询书籍及其对应的作者信息

semantic.reason: 语义一致，原始问题要求显示所有书籍的标题和对应的作者名称，SQL反向翻译描述中的意图、涉及的表、列均与之匹配，且无过滤、聚合、分组或排序条件，符合原始问题的简单查询需求。
